summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KingdomCraft Page Builder. Backend APIs fully functional (14/14 passed), but frontend has critical authentication session persistence issues preventing admin panel access.

critical_bugs.issue: Admin session not persisting between page navigations - user gets logged out when navigating to admin routes
critical_bugs.impact: Admin cannot access Page Builder or admin panel functionality

integration_issues.issue: After successful login, navigation to admin routes redirects back to login page

passed_tests: GET /api/pages - returns all pages including special ones
Special pages (maintenance, home) exist and are properly configured
GET /api/pages/:id works for both special pages
Maintenance mode functionality - registration blocked when enabled
Admin login works during maintenance mode (backend)
Frontend login form accepts credentials and processes login
Maintenance page displays correctly with language toggle
Home page displays correctly when maintenance mode is disabled
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend authentication session persistence. Admin login works but session is lost on navigation to admin routes (/admin, /admin/pages). Check cookie handling, JWT token storage, and authentication context in React app. The AuthContext or cookie management may not be working properly for admin routes.
